title: Spicy Korean Fried Rice
description: A flavorful and spicy take on a classic Korean dish, featuring crispy fried rice and a variety of savory ingredients.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the Korean chili flakes and stir-fry for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the cooked fried rice and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Add the soy sauce and stir-fry for another minute, until the rice is well coated.
Add the chopped green onions and stir-fry for 30 seconds, until wilted.
Transfer the spicy fried rice to a serving platter and serve hot.
